title: Why Humans Dance
puzzle: Why do people across cultures use movement to mark joy, ritual, and belonging?
insight: Dance turns rhythm into visible coordination. It lets people express emotion, signal identity, and feel physically connected to a group.
key_ideas: Dance often appears in celebration and ritual.
Shared movement can strengthen social bonds.
Rhythm gives bodies a common pattern to follow.
mind_blower: Dance is a way of thinking together with the body instead of only with words.
next_curiosity: If moving together feels powerful, what does coordinated movement do to the brain?
narration_text: Why do people across cultures use movement to mark joy, ritual, and belonging? Dance turns rhythm into visible coordination. It lets people express emotion, signal identity, and feel physically connected to a group. Dance often appears in celebration and ritual. Shared movement can strengthen social bonds. Rhythm gives bodies a common pattern to follow. Dance is a way of thinking together with the body instead of only with words. If moving together feels powerful, what does coordinated movement do to the brain?
